scope: Groups G and H round 1 deep prediction review with betting process correction

subagent_roles: data collection agent attempted but failed with transport error
quality_notes.fact_handling: Subagent outputs were treated as draft evidence; conflicting scorers/timelines were rechecked by the main thread before writing.
missing_data: full official xG for all four matches
China Sports Lottery official historical odds for these fixtures

matches.postmortem_file: K:/worldcup/比赛/已完成比赛/小组赛/G组/2026-06-15_比利时_1-1_埃及_复盘.md
model_errors: Belgium attack ceiling was mistaken for attack reliability
Egypt transition threat was described but not priced into the final probability distribution
draw protection was too low for a favorite-vs-low-block first-round match
red-team hold/revise gates did not block an executable favorite lean
betting_errors: favorite win was allowed as the main actionable direction despite unresolved lineup and odds gates
no complete verified odds snapshot was captured before giving conditional betting language
draw and handicap protection were not elevated enough for the user-facing recommendation
next_adjustments: block main-pick language when red-team status is hold or revise

matches.postmortem_file: K:/worldcup/比赛/已完成比赛/小组赛/G组/2026-06-15_伊朗_2-2_新西兰_复盘.md
model_errors: New Zealand attack ceiling was underweighted
Chris Wood support value was treated too narrowly as set-piece/long-ball value
Iran defensive floor against direct play was overestimated
betting_errors: Iran win and low-score narratives were too tightly linked
next_adjustments: raise second-ball and support-run impact around Wood

matches.postmortem_file: K:/worldcup/比赛/已完成比赛/小组赛/H组/2026-06-15_西班牙_0-0_佛得角_复盘.md
model_errors: possession and pass volume were over-converted into goal expectation
Cape Verde defensive floor and emotional first-World-Cup boost were underweighted
draw probability was too low for a deep-block first-round match
betting_errors: conditional Spain betting language remained too strong without full live odds and lineup confirmation
deep handicap risk was mentioned but not fully converted into a no-bet gate
next_adjustments: separate process dominance from 1X2 result probability

matches.postmortem_file: K:/worldcup/比赛/已完成比赛/小组赛/H组/2026-06-15_沙特_1-1_乌拉圭_复盘.md
model_errors: Uruguay physical and pressing advantage was over-converted into win probability
Saudi set-piece and second-ball routes were underweighted
Uruguay control after game-state changes was overestimated
draw probability was still too low despite the narrow-score script
betting_errors: Uruguay win remained the main direction even though the written script was narrow and volatile
Saudi handicap and draw protection should have been higher priority
next_adjustments: lower Uruguay clean-sheet and win-conversion probability
raise Saudi resilience and set-piece threat
avoid binding Uruguay win to under/low-score narratives

aggregate.main_calibration_issue: favorite process dominance was converted too easily into favorite win probability
aggregate.betting_process_issue: risk notes did not operate as hard gates against actionable favorite picks
rules_now_active: No main-pick language when prediction status is pre_match_partial and key lineup/odds variables are unresolved.
No executable handicap or 1X2 advice without a complete odds snapshot.
If red-team verdict is hold or revise, output risk ranking or no-bet until gates are cleared.
Raise draw baseline for first-round favorite-vs-low-block matches.
Separate process dominance from result conversion.
